cards.back: EXISTS is used for retrieving records that contain a specific value in a column, whereas IN is used for retrieving records that match a specific value in a column
NOT EXISTS is used to retrieve records that do not contain a specific value in a column
LEFT JOIN returns all records from the left table and matching records from the right table, whereas RIGHT JOIN returns all records from the right table and matching records from the left table
FULL OUTER JOIN returns all records from both tables, including records with no match in either table
A subquery is a query nested inside another query, often used to perform complex data retrieval and manipulation
